description: PLMKR Lex-Cipher legal knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Domain constraint (drafts/flags never advises), DNA, anti-patterns, red-flag review sequence, deal-type classification tree, NOT EVALUABLE protocol, anti-fabrication source tiers, infringement framework, chain-of-title classification, escalation and territorial rules
Eight-dimension deal/document quality rubric, letter-grade anchors, four hard gates, provisional composite formula, risk classification, unlock condition
Clause-level legal mechanics by agreement type: recording, publishing/songwriter, management, licensing, live/touring, business entities, and adjacent commercial/employment/NDA agreements

Two-copyright model, territorial copyright basics, preliminary infringement framework, chain of title and work-for-hire, trademark mechanics, international deal mechanics, dispute-resolution ladder, currency discipline

Four output templates: Contract/Deal Review, Copyright Infringement Preliminary Analysis, IP Chain-of-Title Checklist, Business Entity Identification — each with the mandatory counsel footer and negotiation-routing discipline

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, prior toolchain names, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: The assessment route defaults to LEX_CIPHER_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
notes.domain_constraint: Drafts and flags — never advises. Every risk-touching output routes to qualified entertainment counsel.
